# Weekly Reviews

> Vault health reports generated by `/weekly-review`.

## Structure

```
weekly-reviews/
├── YYYY-MM-DD.md
└── ...
```

One file per weekly review. Filename is the date the review was run.

## Generated by

`/weekly-review` — see `C04 Claude Obsidian/02 Skills & Commands/weekly-review.md`.

## Why this lives in B05 (not C04)

C04 holds the AI's internal logs (audit trail of moves, promotions, etc.). Weekly reviews are **reports YOU consume** to decide what to clean up — they belong in your operational space.
